changes.description: Moved Google Tag Manager (gtag.js) initialization and configuration from index.html to local aaa.js. Updated index.html to reference aaa.js locally. Tracking ID: G-0P25S2ED06.
Removed the initial 'Microsoft Windows XP' splash screen by setting game_state to 2 (In-Game) at startup and removing the splash render logic in drawmanager.js.
Removed top menu buttons (New Game, Restart, Difficulty, Mute, Hint, Undo) and the menu bar background graphics while preserving underlying logic for future custom UI implementation.
